task_completion.description: Open a chart for the SPY instrument
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is visible with 'SPY' indicated in the title bar, tab, or instrument selector.

task_completion.description: Configure the chart for Daily timeframe and the specified date range
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Series or Chart Settings window shows the timeframe set to 'Daily' (or '1 Day') and the date range configured from January 1, 2023 (or Jan 3, 2023) to December 31, 2024.
The Indicators configuration window shows 'SMA' added with a 'Period' parameter of 50, or an SMA line is visible on the chart with a label indicating a 50 period.
The Indicators configuration window shows 'RSI' added with a 'Period' parameter of 14, or an RSI sub-panel is visible below the main chart with a label indicating a 14 period.

task_completion.description: Initiate the chart data export process
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu (e.g., right-click menu on the chart) or a dialog box for exporting data is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Save the exported data to the specified CSV file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file explorer window shows the file being saved as 'spy_analytical_export.csv' in the directory 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTraderTasks\'.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to configure the chart and indicators.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the trading platform's menus, Data Series dialogs, and Indicator windows rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog belongs to the trading application. The agent did not open a text editor or spreadsheet program to manually type or paste data.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually fabricate the CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using a text editor (like Notepad) or PowerShell echo commands to manually write the CSV headers or data rows.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The instrument is SPY (State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF). The actual trading data starts on 2023-01-03 (Jan 1-2 are holidays/weekends) and ends on 2024-12-31, containing exactly 502 rows of data. The indicators required are Simple Moving Average (SMA) with a period of 50, and Relative Strength Index (RSI) with a period of 14. The final output must be a CSV file containing both price data and these indicator values.
